description: Installs Flutter SDK, Android Studio, Chrome, and VS Code extensions for Flutter development.

messages.flutterNotFound: Flutter not found, installing via Chocolatey...
messages.androidStudioNotFound: Android Studio not found, installing via Chocolatey...
messages.androidStudioSkipped: Android Studio installation is disabled in config.
messages.chromeNotFound: Google Chrome not found, installing via Chocolatey...
messages.chromeSkipped: Chrome installation is disabled in config.
messages.vscodeExtensionsSkipped: VS Code extensions installation is disabled in config.
messages.scriptDisabled: Flutter installation is disabled in config.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.all: Install Flutter SDK, Android Studio, Chrome, extensions (default)
commands.extensions: Install VS Code Flutter/Dart extensions only
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
